description: Read-only state-aware re-entry digest on session start (startup + resume sources only via matcher: "startup|resume" first-line filter, with script-side parser as defense-in-depth; clear and compact suppressed). Bootstrap cases (no config / no profile) early-return with the same prompts as before. After profile exists, stacks up to 3 trigger families -- drift (manifest staleness, schema mismatch, ecosystem change, scoring contract bump), unresolved recommendations, repeated declines -- into a capped 2000-char multi-line digest in fixed priority order. Lock-based first-wins de-duplication prevents duplicate emit on machines with both bash and powershell interpreters. Ships two command entries so bare Windows shells without Git Bash or WSL still get the hint; missing-interpreter entries exit with ENOENT and are silently skipped.
